Hello! This is the Project LITe team at Temple University. We’re sending a quick reminder about the screen time survey for this month. This survey is part of the at-home portion of this wave. As a reminder, you’ll receive $70 for completing all surveys throughout the year. If the survey is partially completed, please re-start it to ensure we receive your responses. Thank you so much for your continued participation and support of our research!
